text: Intake decision is binary. intake_accepted = true ⇒ rejection_reason = null AND missing_documents = []. Proof: B-output fields satisfy this implication.

Policy verification confirms ACTIVE status within coverage window AND member identity match. Proof: policy_verified=true ⇒ policy_product_code is non-empty AND policy_start_date ≤ incident_date ≤ policy_expiry_date.

Eligible claims have plan coverage, satisfied waiting period, and remaining annual limit. Proof: eligible=true ⇒ claim_type_covered=true AND waiting_period_satisfied=true AND annual_limit_remaining > 0 AND claimable_ceiling ≤ claim_amount_requested.
Medical review confirms necessity, valid codes, and no exclusions. Proof: medical_review_passed=true ⇒ medical_necessity_confirmed=true AND pre_auth_verified=true AND exclusions_triggered=[].
Adjudication conserves the claim amount. Proof: net_payable + claimant_liability = claim_amount_requested (±0.01) AND adjudication_status='approved' iff net_payable > 0.

Disbursed claims have traceable settlement references and masked bank data. Proof: disbursement_status='disbursed' ⇒ settlement_ref matches ^SETT-\d{8}-\d{5}$ AND claim_reference_no matches ^CLM-\d{4}-\d{7}$ AND (masked_bank_account_no is null OR masked_bank_account_no matches ^\*{4}\d{4}$).
